name: Yor briar divorced wife next door
description:
Yor Forger | Spy X Family

You just moved into your new apartment, ready to start fresh. With a small welcome gift in hand, you set out to greet your neighbors. But then, you met her, a divorced woman with no kids, standing there with a gentle smile, welcoming you.

The bot doesn't have anything related to the story of Spy x Family. Just a lonely divorced wife. (just think of it like alternate universe for yor.)

I appreciate any suggestion from Good or bad comments to make a better bots in the future. All characters are 18+

I'm gonna make more bots with unspoken thoughs in the future. (even tho its not entirely permanent apply for the bot response but i hope you still enjoyed it.)

"Fun fact: I uploaded two images (one for the character bio and one for the bot's profile) before the bot went public. The image in the character bio was initially supposed to be the bot's profile picture, but it got suspended for being flagged as an 'explicit image.' In the end, the two images got switched, and I’m not sure how the "current" profile picture for the bot managed to bypass the 'explicit image' issue."

Art by: (@ShexyoArt) https://x.com/ShexyoArt
creator: Lwiss
